title: ATO R&D Tax Incentive Registration Form Schema — 15 Aug 2025
description: Captured snapshot of the mandatory fields, char thresholds, and structural requirements for R&D Tax Incentive registration as of 15 Aug 2025. Used by the form-completeness contract test to ensure the API endpoint correctly reports missing/present data for each form dimension.

knowledge_search.description: Each R&D activity must demonstrate a documented search of existing knowledge (ATO s355.200). At minimum one knowledge_search_record per activity.

beneficial_ownership.description: Ultimate Beneficial Ownership (UBO) register for TA 2023 s4 (associate) and s5 (foreign-related) flags. At least one UBO record must exist for the subject entity in the relevant fiscal year.

forecast.description: Three-year R&D expenditure forecast anchored to base FY. Required for Form C and ATP applications. Offsets 1, 2, 3 must all be populated.

facilities.description: R&D facility register. At least one facility must be recorded for the subject entity in the relevant fiscal year.

narratives.description: Narrative drafts for each activity must meet character-count thresholds per the 15 Aug 2025 ATO form specification. Every activity must have all required sections within bounds.
